name: Small Business Innovation and Economic Security Act
summary: This act extends the authorization for the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) programs, and implements various measures to enhance research security, improve funding mechanisms, reduce administrative burden, and strengthen data collection.
affects: Small business concerns, federal agencies administering SBIR/STTR programs, the U.S. innovation ecosystem, and national security.

children.name: Extension of SBIR and STTR Programs
children.summary: Extends the authorization for the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) programs and associated pilot programs until September 30, 2031, allowing federal agencies to continue these programs.
children.affects: Small businesses, federal agencies, and the U.S. research and development ecosystem.
